report.summary: Created 3 OG images for recent pages, fixed UX on 3 learn pages (added Breadcrumb, StructuredData, BackToTop), removed erroneous 'use client' from real-yield page enabling proper metadata export, and corrected OG image references.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: NFTFi Guide 2026: Added Breadcrumb navigation, Article+FAQ JSON-LD structured data, BackToTop component, and OG image metadata reference
Solana Blinks & Actions Guide 2026: Added Breadcrumb navigation, Article+FAQ JSON-LD structured data, and BackToTop component

Real Yield DeFi Guide 2026: Removed incorrect 'use client' directive that was preventing Next.js metadata export from functioning — metadata now works correctly for SEO. Added Breadcrumb, Article JSON-LD structured data, BackToTop, and OG image metadata
Bitcoin Supply Shock Guide 2026: Fixed OG image URL reference to point to newly created SVG asset

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-nftfi-nft-finance-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — glass-morphism design with NFT diamond icon, lending flow visualization, protocol stats (93% Blend market share, 5+ protocols, $2.1B+ volume)

OG image: og-bitcoin-supply-shock-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — exchange reserves decline chart visualization, amber/red Bitcoin color scheme, key stats (7yr low reserves, 1.3M BTC ETF holdings, 3.7M lost)
OG image: og-real-yield-defi-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — horizontal bar chart showing protocol APYs (GMX 18.5%, Aave 12.3%, Pendle 10.8%, Lido 8.2%, Curve 6.5%), green/cyan revenue-backed theme

sections.title: Critical Bug Fix
items: real-yield-defi-guide-2026/page.tsx had 'use client' with zero client-side hooks — Next.js silently ignored the metadata export, meaning this page had NO SEO title, description, or OpenGraph tags. Removed the directive to restore full metadata functionality.

sections.title: UX Audit Backlog (Remaining)
items: 6 pages still need OG images: solana-token-extensions-guide-2026, megaeth-guide-2026, ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide-2026, appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026, story-protocol-ip-tokenization-guide, solana-blinks-actions-guide-2026
Several other recent learn pages likely missing Breadcrumb/StructuredData — recommend adding a linter check to the page scaffold skill
